scenes.visual_prompt: A glowing AI neural network being unplugged, dark futuristic server room, neon lighting
scenes.script_line: Their most hyped product ever, gone.

scenes.visual_prompt: data center server racks with blinking lights
scenes.script_line: Sora was burning billions in GPU costs.
Four billion dollars a year, just to run it.
The real reason? Robots need that compute more.

scenes.visual_prompt: Humanoid robot walking through a modern office, photorealistic, cinematic lighting
scenes.script_line: OpenAI is pivoting hard into physical AI.
Sam Altman bet robots beat video generation.
Physical AI over digital content. That is the bet.

scenes.visual_prompt: futuristic city skyline at night with AI holographic displays
scenes.script_line: The AI video race just lost its biggest player.

scenes.visual_prompt: Empty throne with a crown on the seat, dark dramatic lighting, symbolic illustration
scenes.script_line: Who fills the gap? Follow to find out.
